title: centaurea nervosa subsp. nervosa
intro: Centaurea nervosa subsp. nervosa, also known as the Alpine knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and calming effects. The health benefits of Centaurea nervosa subsp. nervosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
